summary: Tested Retractable 'Viewing As' Persona Bar feature. All core features working correctly - expanded bar, minimize/expand toggle, persistence across navigation, auto-expand on persona change, and EXIT functionality. Mobile floating circle also verified.

expanded_persona_bar.details: Cyan bar at top shows 'VIEWING AS: [ROLE]' with eye icon, dropdown, minimize button, EXIT button

minimize_button.details: ChevronUp button minimizes bar with 250ms animation

minimized_desktop_tab.details: Slim cyan tab at top-center shows persona icon and name with ChevronDown

minimized_mobile_circle.details: Floating cyan circle at top-right shows persona icon

expand_from_minimized.details: Clicking minimized tab/circle expands bar back with 250ms animation

persistence_across_navigation.details: Minimized state persists in localStorage when navigating between pages

auto_expand_on_persona_change.details: Bar automatically expands when selecting new persona from banner dropdown

exit_button.details: EXIT button removes bar completely and clears minimized state from localStorage

banner_dropdown.details: Can switch personas directly from banner dropdown (Pro Athletes, Photographers, Businesses, Surfers sections)

context_for_next_testing_agent: PersonaMaskBanner.js has been completely rewritten with isMinimized state, localStorage persistence under 'personaBarMinimized' key, desktop tab (hidden md:flex), mobile circle (md:hidden), and auto-expand logic via useEffect watching activePersona changes. All UI elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing.
